metadata.title: Expanding A Family Dynasty: Marcus Wallenberg Jr.

So the Wallenbergs, and this is mentioned multiple times throughout the book, they always had more liquidity than other banks and they did never wanted to put themselves or find themselves in a position where they had to rely on the kindness of outsiders. and having like this financial fortress.
